item.title: Post-CQ-043: CLAUDE.md Key Source Layout missing cloud/provisioning/ module entry
item.intent: CLAUDE.md Key Source Layout accurately describes cloud/provisioning/ after CQ-043. Contributors find provisioning code on first look.
item.description: CQ-043 (cloud provisioning engine) creates src/cloud/provisioning/ with provider interface, DigitalOcean adapter, instance registry, and health polling. After CQ-043 completes, CLAUDE.md Key Source Layout under the cloud/ section will be missing this new subdirectory. Same pattern as BUG-006 (src/web/ doc update), BUG-008 (src/secure/ doc update), and BUG-023 (firewall path doc update). Steps: (1) confirm CQ-043 is complete and src/cloud/provisioning/ exists with its key files; (2) open CLAUDE.md, find the cloud/ section in Key Source Layout; (3) add cloud/provisioning/ entry with subdirectories (providers/, cloud-init.ts, snapshot.ts) and ownership description; (4) update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md cloud module section to reflect provisioning submodule; (5) no code changes. Scope: 2 doc files, doc-only change. BLOCKED on CQ-043 — do not sprint until src/cloud/provisioning/ exists.
